impl<C: almost_enough::Cancellable> almost_enough::StopDropRoll for C

pub trait almost_enough::StopExt: enough::Stop + core::marker::Sized

pub fn almost_enough::StopExt::into_boxed(self) -> almost_enough::BoxedStop where Self: 'static
pub fn almost_enough::StopExt::into_token(self) -> almost_enough::StopToken where Self: 'static
pub fn almost_enough::StopExt::or<S: enough::Stop>(self, S) -> almost_enough::OrStop<Self, S>
impl<T: enough::Stop + core::marker::Sized> almost_enough::StopExt for T

pub fn T::into_token(self) -> almost_enough::StopToken where Self: 'static
pub fn T::or<S: enough::Stop>(self, S) -> almost_enough::OrStop<Self, S>
pub trait almost_enough::TimeoutExt: enough::Stop + core::marker::Sized
pub fn almost_enough::TimeoutExt::with_deadline(self, std::time::Instant) -> almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<Self>
pub fn almost_enough::TimeoutExt::with_timeout(self, core::time::Duration) -> almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<Self>

pub fn T::with_timeout(self, core::time::Duration) -> almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<Self>

pub fn almost_enough::SyncStopper::cancelled() -> Self
pub fn almost_enough::SyncStopper::is_cancelled(&self) -> bool
pub fn almost_enough::SyncStopper::new() -> Self
impl core::clone::Clone for almost_enough::SyncStopper
pub fn almost_enough::SyncStopper::clone(&self) -> almost_enough::SyncStopper
impl core::convert::From<almost_enough::SyncStopper> for almost_enough::StopToken
pub fn almost_enough::StopToken::from(almost_enough::SyncStopper) -> Self
impl core::default::Default for almost_enough::SyncStopper
pub fn almost_enough::SyncStopper::default() -> Self
impl core::fmt::Debug for almost_enough::SyncStopper
pub fn almost_enough::SyncStopper::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl enough::Stop for almost_enough::SyncStopper
pub fn almost_enough::SyncStopper::check(&self) -> core::result::Result<(), enough::reason::StopReason>
pub fn almost_enough::SyncStopper::should_stop(&self) -> bool
impl core::marker::Freeze for almost_enough::SyncStopper
impl core::marker::Send for almost_enough::SyncStopper
impl core::marker::Sync for almost_enough::SyncStopper
impl core::marker::Unpin for almost_enough::SyncStopper
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for almost_enough::SyncStopper
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for almost_enough::SyncStopper
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for almost_enough::SyncStopper
pub struct almost_enough::WithTimeout<T>
impl<T: enough::Stop> almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>
pub fn almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>::deadline(&self) -> std::time::Instant
pub fn almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>::inner(&self) -> &T
pub fn almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>::into_inner(self) -> T
pub fn almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>::new(T, core::time::Duration) -> Self
pub fn almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>::remaining(&self) -> core::time::Duration
pub fn almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>::with_deadline(T, std::time::Instant) -> Self
impl<T: enough::Stop> almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>
pub fn almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>::tighten(self, core::time::Duration) -> Self
pub fn almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>::tighten_deadline(self, std::time::Instant) -> Self
impl<T: core::clone::Clone> core::clone::Clone for almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>
pub fn almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>::clone(&self) -> almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>
impl<T: core::fmt::Debug> core::fmt::Debug for almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>
pub fn almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl<T: enough::Stop> enough::Stop for almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>
pub fn almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>::check(&self) -> core::result::Result<(), enough::reason::StopReason>
pub fn almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T>::should_stop(&self) -> bool
impl<T> core::marker::Freeze for almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T> where T: core::marker::Freeze
impl<T> core::marker::Send for almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T> where T: core::marker::Send
impl<T> core::marker::Sync for almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T> where T: core::marker::Sync
impl<T> core::marker::Unpin for almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T> where T: core::marker::Unpin
impl<T> core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T> where T: core::marker::UnsafeUnpin
impl<T> core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T> where T: core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe
impl<T> core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<T> where T: core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe
pub trait almost_enough::Cancellable: core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send
pub fn almost_enough::Cancellable::stop(&self)
impl almost_enough::Cancellable for almost_enough::ChildStopper
pub fn almost_enough::ChildStopper::stop(&self)
impl almost_enough::Cancellable for almost_enough::Stopper
pub fn almost_enough::Stopper::stop(&self)
pub trait almost_enough::CloneStop: enough::Stop + core::clone::Clone + 'static
impl<T: enough::Stop + core::clone::Clone + 'static> almost_enough::CloneStop for T
pub trait almost_enough::DebouncedTimeoutExt: enough::Stop + core::marker::Sized
pub fn almost_enough::DebouncedTimeoutExt::with_debounced_deadline(self, std::time::Instant) -> almost_enough::DebouncedTimeout<Self>
pub fn almost_enough::DebouncedTimeoutExt::with_debounced_timeout(self, core::time::Duration) -> almost_enough::DebouncedTimeout<Self>
impl<T: enough::Stop> almost_enough::DebouncedTimeoutExt for T
pub fn T::with_debounced_deadline(self, std::time::Instant) -> almost_enough::DebouncedTimeout<Self>
pub fn T::with_debounced_timeout(self, core::time::Duration) -> almost_enough::DebouncedTimeout<Self>
pub trait almost_enough::StopDropRoll: almost_enough::Cancellable
pub fn almost_enough::StopDropRoll::stop_on_drop(&self) -> almost_enough::CancelGuard<Self>
impl<C: almost_enough::Cancellable> almost_enough::StopDropRoll for C
pub fn C::stop_on_drop(&self) -> almost_enough::CancelGuard<Self>
pub trait almost_enough::StopExt: enough::Stop + core::marker::Sized
pub fn almost_enough::StopExt::child(&self) -> almost_enough::ChildStopper where Self: core::clone::Clone + 'static
pub fn almost_enough::StopExt::into_boxed(self) -> almost_enough::BoxedStop where Self: 'static
pub fn almost_enough::StopExt::into_token(self) -> almost_enough::StopToken where Self: 'static
pub fn almost_enough::StopExt::or<S: enough::Stop>(self, S) -> almost_enough::OrStop<Self, S>
impl<T: enough::Stop + core::marker::Sized> almost_enough::StopExt for T
pub fn T::child(&self) -> almost_enough::ChildStopper where Self: core::clone::Clone + 'static
pub fn T::into_boxed(self) -> almost_enough::BoxedStop where Self: 'static
pub fn T::into_token(self) -> almost_enough::StopToken where Self: 'static
pub fn T::or<S: enough::Stop>(self, S) -> almost_enough::OrStop<Self, S>
pub trait almost_enough::TimeoutExt: enough::Stop + core::marker::Sized
pub fn almost_enough::TimeoutExt::with_deadline(self, std::time::Instant) -> almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<Self>
pub fn almost_enough::TimeoutExt::with_timeout(self, core::time::Duration) -> almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<Self>
impl<T: enough::Stop> almost_enough::time::TimeoutExt for T
pub fn T::with_deadline(self, std::time::Instant) -> almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<Self>
pub fn T::with_timeout(self, core::time::Duration) -> almost_enough::time::WithTimeout<Self>
